name: Airtable
description: Search, create, update records and manage bases in Airtable
longDescription: Official Airtable MCP server for interacting with your Airtable bases. Search, create, update, and delete records. Manage schemas, views, and fields. Supports both OAuth and Personal Access Token authentication. Requires data.records:read, data.records:write, and schema.bases:read scopes.
author: Airtable

apiKeyConfig.label: Airtable Personal Access Token
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create a PAT at airtable.com/create/tokens with required scopes and base access

examplePrompts: Show me the schema for the Projects base
Create a new record in the Tasks table
Find all records where Status is 'In Progress'
Update record rec123 to mark as complete
Get all views for the Contacts table
